misc: Has been working on his mental game a lot
biography: Eero, the younger brother of the well-known Pasi, is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, representing Vuosaari Golf Helsinki. Despite his easy-going demeanor off the course, Eero is known for his intense focus and determination when he steps onto the green.

With eight past appearances in the tournament, Eero has shown a consistent presence and a deep understanding of the challenges it presents. Although the coveted Hector Trophée has eluded him thus far, Eero has distinguished himself by winning the Victor Trophy in the past, a testament to his individual skill and competitive spirit.

In recent times, Eero has been dedicating himself to enhancing his mental game, seeking to further refine his ability to perform under pressure. While he is not currently slated to participate in Hector Trophée 2026, golf enthusiasts know that last-minute changes can always occur, leaving the door open for Eero to once again showcase his talents.
